title: coryphantha conimamma
intro: Coryphantha conimamma, also known as the 'dwarf pincushion', is a species of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. This plant is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coryphantha conimamma include relief from fever, pain, and swelling, as well as its ability to treat skin conditions and wounds. Coryphantha conimamma can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it is often used in folk medicine in regions where it is native, such as the southwestern United States and Mexico.
